shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,130p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '440,575p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '880,1060p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '1,230p' src/day.tsx; sed -n '410,465p' src/day.tsx; rg -n \"toZonedTime|fromZonedTime|formatDate|date-fns-tz|timeZone\" src/date_utils.ts src/*.tsx | head -180"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1230,1310p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '1800,1910p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '650,930p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '130,220p' src/date_utils.ts; sed -n '400,470p' src/date_utils.ts; sed -n '1480,1610p' src/date_utils.ts; cat package.json | sed -n '1,120p'"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"<Calendar|renderCalendar|handleSelect|onSelect\" src/index.tsx src/calendar.tsx | tail -80; sed -n '1930,2080p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '100,190p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '790,880p' src/calendar.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '820,930p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '1715,1835p' src/index.tsx; sed -n '350,390p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '230,280p' src/calendar.tsx; sed -n '220,285p' src/date_utils.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '730,840p' src/index.tsx; git diff -- src/index.tsx | sed -n '1,260p'; nmem --json m search \"react-datepicker timezone\" --limit 5"
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/index.tsx && yarn tsc --noEmit && git diff --check && git status --short'
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --write src/index.tsx && yarn tsc --noEmit && git diff --check && git status --short'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "DatePicker configured timeZone calendar selection formatting" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "react-datepicker DatePicker timezone handling: values supplied through selected, startDate, endDate, and selectedDates are callback instants, but calendar and input logic must first convert them with toZonedTime into wall-clock dates for the configured timeZone. Selection comparisons and multi-date toggling use those zoned values; only onChange/onSelect boundaries convert clicked wall-clock dates back with fromZonedTime. This prevents off-by-one calendar highlighting and formatted input values in zones far from the browser zone." -t "DatePicker timezone display and callback invariant" --unit-type learning -l react-datepicker -l timezone -s codex -i 0.8'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
